name: WI-779-A: Collapse IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED branches to v2-only (no deletions)
description: Phase A of WI-779 terminal flag removal. Collapse every IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED decision branch to its v2 arm across apps/api routes, middleware, inngest functions, and services; delete the now-unreachable legacy else-arm at each site. Legacy MODULES and the flag symbol stay in place (deleted in WI-779-B) so every intermediate PR compiles and all suites stay green.
acceptanceCriteria: Every isIdentityV2Enabled(...) / isIdentityV2EnabledInStep() / if(opts?.identityV2Enabled) DECISION branch in apps/api production code (routes/middleware/inngest/services) is collapsed to the v2 path and the legacy else-arm removed. The flag symbol (config.ts isIdentityV2Enabled, inngest/helpers isIdentityV2EnabledInStep) and ALL legacy/twin MODULE files remain present and compiling — their deletion is WI-779-B. Builder derives the exact site list FRESH from an origin/main worktree (the prior scope sweep ran behind-main and is counts-only; trust the compiler + grep, not the stale list). Verification: tsc --build clean; nx run api:test plus the 51 cross-package integration suites green; the required flag-on integration lane green with v2 as the only reachable path; grep confirms no reachable legacy-arm branch remains (the flag-symbol DEFINITION may still exist). NO module deletions and NO flag-symbol removal in this child. Premise confirmed (prd+stg flag=true, WI-805 dropped legacy subscriptions -> flip complete+irreversible; this is cleanup).
